'''âd-zh-th-g''' ('''kadazhthegoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:unblank|unblank]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-zh-th-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:unblank|unblank]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âd-zh-th-g
|-
! Lemma
| kadazhthegoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidazhthegoko|thidazhthegoko]] || [[word:jidazhthegoko|jidazhthegoko]] || [[word:shidazhthegoko|shidazhthegoko]] || [[word:kidazhthegoko|kidazhthegoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
